Notice Of Motion To Vacate Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-26-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC.'s Motion To Vacate Judgment.

GRANTED. No opposition filed.

Counsel for Creditors Trade is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.
